generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures 3D point clouds of the vehicle's surroundings, processed via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides depth and RGB data for environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthAndRGBDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly measures the ego vehicle's speed and steering angle via onboard systems."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorAndServoFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides real-time status of actuation components (motor and servo)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ActuationFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthAndRGBDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ActuationFeedbackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorAndServoFeedbackSensor
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Uses DBSCAN algorithm for segmenting LiDAR point clouds into object clusters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Applies Kalman filtering for object state estimation and tracking."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 Class I Adaptive Cruise Control algorithm computing desired speed based on lead vehicle distance."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks containing ID, position, and velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracksTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of ego vehicle speed and steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance RawSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw sensor data including LiDAR point clouds and camera feeds."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted, DepthAndRGBDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance ActuationFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time status updates of motor and servo components."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ActuationFeedbackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataSynchronizationEnabler
]

instance ThreeDCADRepresentation : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D CAD representations of the vehicle and environment for real-time UI rendering."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Implements DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking using MATLAB/Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Pre-processes raw sensor data (LiDAR, camera) before transmission to the DT."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes ACC algorithm (ISO 15622 Class I) for desired speed computation."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveCruiseControlService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Stores ego vehicle state and object tracks in an external SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataReportingService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Renders real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles message serialization, unit conversion, and protocol alignment between ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataSynchronizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ensures synchronization between DT and PT via actuation feedback updates."
    DTDFVocab:enables ActuationControlService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides inter-component communication via ROS2 topics and nodes."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, AdaptiveCruiseControlService, ObjectTrackingService
]

instance JetsonHardwareIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Integrates NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano hardware with ROS2 and Jetpack 5.0 SDK."
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, DrivingPathInsight
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes and offloads ACC system processing from PT to DT, reducing computational burden on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables enable/disable ACC, desired speed modification, and emergency braking via Control Panel."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction, EmergencyBrakingAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance DataReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateReportInsight, ObjectTracksReportInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Processes LiDAR point clouds into structured object tracks (ID, position, velocity) for DT consumption."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectDetectionInsight
]

instance ActuationControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Controls physical actuation components based on DT commands."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorActuationControl, SteeringControl, EmergencyBrakingControl
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ego vehicle speed and steering angle for system performance tracking."
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of surrounding vehicles and objects for environmental awareness."
]

instance DrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projection of the vehicle's intended driving path based on current state and ACC commands."
]

instance ACCPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance metrics of the ACC system including responsiveness and compliance with ISO 15622."
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series data of vehicle state for post-hoc analysis and anomaly detection."
]

instance ObjectTracksReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series data of object tracks for post-hoc analysis of ACC behavior."
]

instance ObjectDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection and tracking of objects in the vehicle's surroundings using processed LiDAR data."
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable the Adaptive Cruise Control system remotely."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execute remote emergency braking commands via motor actuation system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Modify the desired speed of the vehicle via remote management."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuationControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Controls motor voltage commands for speed adjustment."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SteeringControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Controls vehicle steering angle via servo mechanism."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes emergency braking commands via motor actuation system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller."
]

instance SteeringServoActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls the vehicle's steering angle through a servo mechanism."
]

instance EmergencyBrakingActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Executes remote emergency braking commands via the motor actuation system."
]

// C10: Components (Physical Twin Entity)
instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Primary compute platform running NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK and ROS2 for autonomy stack processing."
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Interfaces with the vehicle's motor to convert voltage commands into mechanical actuation."
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Two-layer chassis architecture hosting lower-level steering/speed control and upper-level autonomy components."
]

// C10: Environments
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, VedderElectronicSpeedController, TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis,
                 HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleStateSensor,
                 MotorAndServoFeedbackSensor, MotorActuationComponent, SteeringServoActuationComponent,
                 EmergencyBrakingActuationComponent
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlModel, ObjectTracksData,
                 VehicleStateData, RawSensorData, ActuationFeedbackData, ThreeDCADRepresentation,
                 PointCloudProcessingEnabler, DataPreProcessingEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler,
                 DataStorageEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler,
                 DataSynchronizationEnabler, ROS2MiddlewareEnabler, JetsonHardwareIntegrationEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT-to-PT interaction includes the following outputs and commands: **1) Desired speed commands**: Computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** (Digital Twin Entity) based on lead vehicle distance, sent back to the PT via Wi-Fi and executed by the **Actuation FE** (Physical Twin Entity). **2) Emergency braking commands**: Triggered remotely via the **Control Panel** (User Entity) and transmitted to the PT for immediate execution. **3) Actuation feedback loops**: The DT monitors the PT’s response (e.g., speed adjustments) via sensor data streams to ensure real-time synchronization. Communication adheres to a **100 ms latency requirement** (3GPP TS 22.185) for V2V communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates under the following **time-scale constraints**:
    - **Network latency**: ≤100 ms end-to-end (PT ↔ DT) to support real-time ACC control (per 3GPP TS 22.185).
    - **Clock synchronization**: All components must synchronize clocks to an accuracy of **±100 ms** to ensure event ordering and data integrity in distributed operations.
    - **Perception cycle**: Object tracks are updated at rates dependent on sensor refresh (e.g., LiDAR typically operates at **10–30 Hz**, though exact rates are not specified in the document). The **Data Collection FE** aggregates and forwards these updates to the DT."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as follows: **1) Entities**: **Physical Twin Entity** (PT resources), **Digital Twin Entity** (core DT logic), and **User Entity** (UI/control). **2) Functional Entities (FEs)**: Mapped to ISO 23247 where applicable (e.g., **Data Collecting FE**, **Controlling FE**, **User Interface FE**), with deviations (e.g., **Physical Twin Entity** added, **Data Storage** unaligned). **3) Deployment**: FEs are implemented as **ROS2 packages**, deployed across **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (PT) and **external server/cloud** (DT). **4) Data Flow**: Sensor data → **Physical Twin Entity** → **Digital Twin Entity** → **User Entity** → **Physical Twin Entity** (closed-loop). **5) Orchestration**: Centralized coordination via **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi**, with **clock synchronization** (±100 ms) for distributed operations."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle stages: **1) Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC development, leveraging **3D CAD design** and simulators (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing). **2) Development Phase**: Enables **real-time validation** of ACC algorithms via the DT’s **remote management** and **data monitoring** capabilities. **3) Operation Phase**: Supports **health monitoring**, **predictive maintenance**, and **fleet optimization** by collecting and analyzing vehicle data. The DT represents the PT in its **as-operated** state, with real-time synchronization for dynamic adjustments (e.g., ACC parameter tuning)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through: **1) Real-time synchronization**: **≤100 ms latency** and **±100 ms clock sync** for accurate PT-DT alignment. **2) Sensor fidelity**: **LiDAR (Hokuyo UST-10LX)** and **camera (Intel D435i)** provide high-resolution environmental data. **3) Model validation**: **ACC algorithm** adheres to **ISO 15622 Class I** standards. **4) Data integrity**: **Kalman filters** and **DBSCAN** ensure robust object tracking. **5) Verification**: **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** communication are tested for reliability. **6) Uncertainty management**: **Data Translation FE** handles unit conversions and message alignment to mitigate errors. **7) Safety validation**: **Emergency braking** commands are prioritized in the control loop. The DT does not include **uncertainty quantification** for sensor noise or model errors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections between the physical twin and digital twin include:
    - **Local Communication**: **ROS2 network** for intra-vehicle data exchange (e.g., sensor → processing → actuation).
    - **Remote Communication**: **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (Digital Twin ↔ User Entity ↔ Physical Twin Entity), constrained to **≤100 ms latency** (3GPP TS 22.185).
    - **Data Translation**: The **Data Translation FE** handles serialization/deserialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions (e.g., voltage → speed) across ROS2 and custom formats.
    No explicit mention of **UDP/TCP protocols** or **network topology** (e.g., star) is provided in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows: **1) Physical Twin**: **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard PT) runs **ROS2 nodes** for **Physical Twin Entity** (sensors, actuators). **2) Digital Twin**: Deployed on an **external server/cloud** for compute-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC computation). **3) User Entity**: **Web-based UI** (3D Visualization + Control Panel) accessible via browser. **4) Data Storage**: **External SQL database** for long-term data retention. **5) Deployment Strategy**: **Modular ROS2 packages** enable independent updates to FEs. **6) Hardware Constraints**: PT uses **resource-constrained ECUs**; DT offloads computation to mitigate this."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is enabled through:
    - **Standards Compliance**:
      - **ISO 15622** for ACC control logic.
      - **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication latency requirements.
      - **ISO 23247 Part 2** as the base reference architecture (with automotive adaptations).
    - **Tool Interoperability**: **ROS2** allows integration with other ROS2-based systems (e.g., simulation environments). The **SQL database** could theoretically integrate with **ERP/PLM systems**, though this is not explicitly described in the document."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy considerations are **not explicitly addressed** in the document. However, implied aspects include: **1) PT Owner**: Likely retains ownership of **vehicle data** (sensor logs, state data). **2) DT Service Provider**: May manage **processed data** (e.g., reports, analytics) but lacks clarity on access rights. **3) Ethical Use**: Data is used for **monitoring, optimization, and maintenance**, but **no anonymization or encryption** details are provided. **4) Compliance**: No mention of **GDPR, CCPA, or automotive-specific regulations** (e.g., ISO 26262 for safety)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following **standards**:
    - **ISO 23247 Part 2**: Reference architecture for digital twins (adapted for automotive use).
    - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) system requirements (Performance Class I implemented).
    - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Service requirements for Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication, including **≤100 ms latency**.
    The document does not mention **AUTOSAR**, **IEC 61588** (for time synchronization), or other automotive-specific standards like **ISO 26262** for functional safety."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through: **1) Safety**: **Emergency braking** is prioritized in the control loop; **ACC logic** adheres to **ISO 15622** for Class I systems. **2) Latency Constraints**: **≤100 ms end-to-end latency** ensures timely actuation. **3) Clock Synchronization**: **±100 ms accuracy** prevents desynchronization in distributed operations. **4) Limited Security**: **No explicit cybersecurity measures** (e.g., encryption, authentication) are mentioned for Wi-Fi or ROS2 communication. **5) Human-in-the-Loop**: The DT is classified as **Fully Autonomous with Human-in-the-Loop** (David & Bork taxonomy), allowing operator oversight. **6) Risk Mitigation**: **Data Translation FE** ensures protocol compatibility but does not address **cyberattacks** or **data spoofing**."
]
